title: Motorbiking Boulder: 4 Mile Canyon, Logan Mill Road, Sugarloaf Road, Switzerland Tr, Bear Gulch

enrichment.summary: Kyle recounts a ~70-mile motorbike ride through the canyons and trails around Boulder, Colorado, covering Four Mile Canyon, Logan Mill Road, Sugarloaf Road, Switzerland Trail, and Bear Gulch. He describes terrain conditions, getting lost briefly, roads still closed due to snow, and running out of gas at the end.
enrichment.speaker: kyle

stances.position: Really fun — steep, loose, and bouncy in a good way
Cool narrow road he's done on mountain bike many times; manageable on motorbike
Accepts them as normal — snow still present, some roads not open to motor bikes yet

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went up Boulder Canyon and then four mile canyon.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went up Logan Mill Road to the left.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was directed to Sugar Loaf Road, which is paved.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went to the other side of Sugar Loaf Mountain down Switzerland Trail, which is a small trail for motor bikes and ATVs.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I saw a car up there on Switzerland Trail.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I went up Bare Gulch, which was really fun, steep, and loose.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I was bouncing up the whole Bare Gulch trail.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I took a ride back up Sugar Loaf to Peak to Peak Highway.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The whole trip was about 70 miles.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I ran out of gas at the end of the trip.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We took a detour down some dirt road just to see where it went.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We went up to the end of that road, but it wasn't open yet.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I think one of the trails will be opened for mountain motor bikes later on.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We went up to Green Ridge Lake, but it was closed before we could actually get to the lake.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: There was still a lot of snow up there.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We went down to the town of Ward and up Switzerland Trail.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We got lost and went around looking for Switzerland Trail.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Some dude had his own lake all to himself.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We turned around where the lake is and went down Switzerland Trail.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I've mountain biked Switzerland Trail a bunch of times.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: Switzerland Trail has a cool narrow road.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We went back up Bare Gulch for the second time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We went to the base of Sugar Loaf Mountain.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We went back down this part of Switzerland Trail for the second time.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: We went down Four Mile Canyon back home.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The whole trip was about 70 miles.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: I ran out of gas and had to use the reserve tank.

claims.subject: Kyle
claims.claim: The new trail was part of the adventure.
